title: rubus × chnoophyllus var. macrodontus
intro: Rubus × chnoophyllus var. macrodontus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known species of bramble that is a cross between the black raspberry and another Rubus species. The plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × chnoophyllus var. macrodontus include potential relief from inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into jams, jellies, and teas, although it is not commonly used in modern herbalism and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
